entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important oilseed crop (Arachis hypogaea L.) cultivated in 96 countries.

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of yield per unit area, noted as low globally at 1.30 t ha–1.

entities.name: GERMPLASM ACCESSIONS
entities.description: The available genetic variability contained in the collection of groundnut samples.

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs aimed at enhancing crop traits using genetic resources.

entities.name: GENETIC BASE
entities.description: The breadth of genetic diversity within cultivars.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Economic traits requiring extensive evaluation for crop improvement.

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of a larger germplasm collection designed to facilitate access and management.

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: The biological materials and genes available for use in breeding.

entities.name: GENEBANK MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of organizing and maintaining genetic resources.

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: The facility housing 14310 accessions of groundnut.

entities.name: BOTANICAL VARIETIES
entities.description: The six categories used to stratify germplasm accessions.

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL DESCRIPTOR TRAITS
entities.description: 14 traits used for clustering to develop the core collection.

entities.name: WARD'S METHOD
entities.description: A clustering method used to group accessions based on morphological traits.

entities.name: T TEST
entities.description: A statistical test used for mean comparisons between the entire collection and the core collection.

entities.name: CHI-SQUARE TEST
entities.description: A statistical test used for distribution analysis between the entire collection and the core collection.

entities.name: WILCOXON'S RANK-SUM TEST
entities.description: A non-parametric statistical test used for distribution analysis.

entities.name: SHANNON-WEAVER DIVERSITY INDEX
entities.description: An index used to measure diversity for different traits.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC CORRELATIONS
entities.description: Relationships between different traits potentially controlled by co-adapted gene complexes.

entities.name: CO-ADAPTED GENE COMPLEXES
entities.description: Groups of genes that are inherited together and control phenotypic correlations.

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of a crop.
